scope.summary: Creates, tests, activates, and deploys Power Pages code sites; can create Dataverse data models, sample data, web roles, site settings, table permissions, Web API integrations, server logic, and cloud flow integrations.

bundledScripts.purpose: Node.js helpers for Dataverse requests, Power Pages metadata, validation, rendering plans, key vault actions, cache clearing, Playwright MCP launch, and skill tracking.

servers.name: microsoft-learn
servers.purpose: Fetch Microsoft Learn documentation for server logic and platform workflows.

connectors.name: Dataverse
connectors.riskNotes: Used for tables, metadata, Web API integration, permissions, site settings, and sample data.

connectors.name: Power Automate cloud flows
connectors.riskNotes: Cloud flow integration skill can register and invoke flows from Power Pages.

powerPlatformGovernance.dlpImpact: High. Workflows can create Dataverse assets, configure web roles, invoke cloud flows, and expose Power Pages endpoints. Requires zone-specific DLP and external exposure review.

technologies.name: Model Context Protocol
technologies.usedFor: Playwright and Microsoft Learn MCP integration.

exceptions: Current workflow supports React, Angular, Vue, and Astro with custom generated styling. EDS usage has not been added or reviewed.

blockers: Internal owner and support channel are not assigned.
Skills, agents, hooks, scripts, and MCP configuration are not reviewed against Equinor guidance.
Production-system interaction is possible by default through deploy, activate, Dataverse, Web API, permissions, and cloud flow workflows.
Power Platform zone mapping and data classification ceiling are not documented.
EDS guidance is not integrated into generated frontend workflows.
Technology Radar status is unknown for several framework and testing dependencies.
GitHub Copilot marketplace manifest is missing.

evidence.summary: Documents site creation, deployment, activation, Dataverse data modeling, Web API integration, server logic, cloud flow, and testing workflows.
Registers Playwright stdio MCP and Microsoft Learn HTTP MCP.
Contains many Node.js scripts that require security and behavior review before publication.

notes: Initial review record only. This record intentionally defers publication until detailed review evidence exists.
